title: Implement prompt boundary delimiters and sandwich defense
source: OWASP LLM Top 10 2025 (LLM01) + arXiv:2506.08837 Design Patterns for Securing LLM Agents
description: Current sanitize_prompt_content() only strips nulls and truncates. No structural injection defense. User ticket descriptions flow directly into claude -p prompts without boundary delimiters.
proposed_changes: Add wrap_untrusted_content() with XML delimiters. Add detect_injection_patterns() scanner. Apply sandwich defense in build_prompt() and meeseeks prompts.
